title: TradeChanger
description: Advanced Villager Trade editor with GUI. Customize prices, currency, chances, and enchantments ingame!
body:
# 💎 TradeChange
**TradeChange** is a powerful and easy-to-use plugin for server administrators that allows you to fully control the economy of your residents. Forget about complicated manual configurations — set everything up through a convenient menu right in the game!

## 🔥 Key Features

* **🖥️ Convenient GUI:** Edit trades for all 13 professions through an intuitive interface.
* **💰 Dynamic prices:** Set a price range (for example, `10-20`). Residents will have a random but stable price within this range.
* **💎 Custom currency:** Tired of emeralds? Make residents trade for **Deep Slate Diamond Ore**, Gold, or any other item!
* **🎲 Chance control:** You decide the probability of an item appearing (from 0% to 100%).
* **📚 Full enchantment support:** Separate price settings for each book (Mending, Sharpness, etc.) in the Librarian.
* **🔄 Updating existing residents:** The plugin automatically updates trades even for old residents when interacting.
* **🏷️ Discount support:** The “Village Hero” and zombie healing mechanics continue to work on top of your base prices.

## ⚙️ How to use?

1.  Enter the command **/tradechange** to open the menu.

![Open Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2369d8b0bfd98cf6b4dc6c616418ed054c1dd6c9.png)

2.  Select the profession and item you want to change.
3.  Follow the instructions in the chat:
* Enter the price range (for example: `12-24`).
    * Select the currency (`1` - Emerald, `2` - Ore/Other).
* Set the appearance chance (`100` for guaranteed appearance)
4.  Done! All new and existing residents will use your settings.

## 📜 Commands and permissions

* `/tradechange` — Open the main settings menu.
* `/tradechange reload` — Reload the configuration.
* **Permission:** `tradechange.admin` (to use all features).

---
